resources.string: Failed to save game! Is the SD card mounted and writable?

Andor's Trail was unable to load the savegame file.

:(

The file may be damaged or incomplete.
Andor\'s Trail was unable to load the savegame file. This savegame file is created with a newer version than what is currently running.
Andor\'s Trail was unable to load the savegame file. This savegame file has already been continued.
You take your last breath and die.
You can now flee combat by clicking in the direction you want to move.
%1$s gets a critical hit for %2$d hp!
You get a critical hit on %1$s for %2$d hp!
Not enough AP left this round.
You fall unconscious, but fortunately wake up alive, dazed and fatigued. You lost %1$d experience.
Base combat statistics (without equipment and skills)
You will lose your current game and your current character, are you sure you want to start a new game?
The current game is unsaved and you will lose your character.
Can\'t load from an empty slot.
Loading this game deletes its save slot. You will have to save again before switching to another game.
Adds %1$d to your base attack chance.
Adds %1$d to your base attack damage.
Adds %1$d to your base block chance.
Do you want to rest here?
You have rested and regained your full health.

Welcome to Andor\'s Trail, an open-source roguelike RPG on Android.

Game forums on andorstrail.com for questions and gameplay discussions.

Game wiki for info about the Andor\'s Trail world, among other things.

Project source code on github.com for developers.

Please visit the forums to discuss the game with other players.

This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by the Free Software Foundation; either version 2 of the License, or (at your option) any later version.

This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful, but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the GNU General Public License for more details.

You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License along with this program; if not, see http://www.gnu.org/licenses

For source code and feature requests, please visit the project page at https://github.com/AndorsTrailRelease/andors-trail/

Game Settings can be found by pressing your device\'s Menu Button.

________________

Interface Icons

The Chest

Quickslots [Long press the pouches inside to assign items for instant use]

The Hero

Menu [Overview, Quests, Skills & Inventory *]

* (While in inventory, "press" an item for information & "long press" for more options)

The Enemy

Information [Appears during Combat]

________________

Combat

Actions taken during battle cost AP...

Attacking - [3AP] *

* (Equipping Gear & Using Items may alter AP & usage cost)

Using Items - [5AP]
Fleeing - [6AP]

________________

Advanced Combat

During Combat, long press a tile adjacent to the Hero...
To Flee

(chosen tile is highlighted - Attack Button changes to Move)

[flee mode activated - Long press enemy to re-enter combat]

To Change Targets

(the red target highlight shifts between enemies)

[the target has been changed]

Thank you for downloading Andor's Trail!

Please note that this version of Andor's Trail is a WORK IN PROGRESS, which means that all maps are not yet complete.
Please visit the project forums to discuss the game with other players or to help make the game even better (see "about").

Thanks for all the feedback!
\n\nIn order to save and load your games (and only for this purpose) Andor\'s Trail will ask you for permission to access your storage.

Andor\'s Trail writes saved games to user accessible storage on your device. This allows you to easily back up your saved games or transfer them to a new device. Please visit our forums for more information.\n\nAndor\'s Trail does not use access to your device for any other purpose and does not access the internet. Andor\'s Trail is open source; the sources can be found on github.
Displays the game in fullscreen mode. (Requires restart)
Gives a question about whether you want to rest when entering a bed. Otherwise, you will always automatically rest.
Enables the \'Do you want to attack..?\' dialog box when attacking a monster.
Choose how you want to show the results of a fight to be shown (gold, experience, items).
Show loot dialog box when finding items
Show notification only when finding items
Type of movement method and handling of obstacles.
Makes the game view display everything larger or smaller.
Select the language. English is used if the system language is not available or content has not been translated. (Requires restart)
Enables a virtual on-screen directional pad to guide movement.
If the virtual d-pad is enabled, this setting allows the d-pad to be minimized by pressing its center.
Are you sure you want to sell %1$s? This item is %2$s and you might not be able to recover it.
Recover action points on every kill
Recover health points on every kill
Gain health on each level up
Decrease amount of lost experience when dying
Increased chance of finding magic items
Increases attack chance by %1$d percentage points for each skill level.
Increases max damage by %1$d for each skill level.
For every skill level, decreases the buying and selling gold penalty by %1$d percentage points.
Increases block chance by %1$d percentage points for each skill level.
Increases damage resistance by %1$d for each skill level.
Increases any existing critical skill given by equipment by %1$d %% for each skill level.
Increases any existing critical multiplier given by equipment by %1$d %% for each skill level.
Increases maximum action points (AP) by %1$d for each skill level.
Increases chance of finding gold in monster drops by %1$d %%, and increases amount of gold in drops by %2$d %% for each skill level (up to the maximum amount that the monster drops).
Increases amount of exp given by defeating monsters by %1$d %% for each skill level.
Gives +%1$d action points (AP) on every kill per skill level.
Gives +%1$d health points (HP) on every kill per skill level.
On every subsequent level-up, maximum health points (HP) will be raised by %1$d per skill level. This is not applied retroactively, only subsequent level-ups will be affected.
For every skill level, reduces both the chance of failed flee attempts by %1$d %% and the chance that an adjacent monster will attack by %2$d %%.
Gain +%1$d health points (HP) on every round per skill level when no monsters are directly adjacent.

For every skill level, reduces the amount of lost experience caused by death by %1$d %% (percentage of existing exp loss value, not percentage points). %2$d levels will remove all experience loss caused by death.
Increases the chance of finding non-ordinary items by %1$d %% for every skill level.

Lowers the chance of being afflicted with mental conditions by %1$d %% for every skill level, up to a maximum of %2$d %%. This includes conditions caused by monster attacks such as Dazed or Weapon Feebleness.

Lowers the chance of being afflicted with conditions affecting your physical capacity by %1$d %% for every skill level, up to a maximum of %2$d %%. This includes conditions caused by monster attacks such as Fatigue.

Lowers the chance of being afflicted with disorders of the blood by %1$d %% for every skill level, up to a maximum of %2$d %%. This includes conditions caused by monster attacks such as Poison or bleeding wounds.
To level up this skill, you need at least level %1$d of the %2$s skill.
To level up this skill, you need at least experience level %1$d.
To level up this skill, you need at least %1$d %2$s (base stats).
You may select one skill to improve. Skill points are kept until used.
You may select %1$d skills to improve.
This level also gives you a new skill point to spend!
This Savegame contains a different player name (%1$s) than your current player name (%2$s). Are you sure you want to overwrite this savegame?
Please select the directory to export all files to.
The target Folder contains existing files with the same name of some Files that should be exported. Are you sure you want to overwrite those files?
An unknown error occurred while exporting.
Please select all Savegames you want to import.
An unknown error occurred while importing.

There is already a savegame in the target slot. Do you want to keep the existing save, overwrite it with the imported save or import the save to a slot?

%1$s

%2$s
Please select the Worldmap zip file.
Are you sure you selected a worldmap? Please select the zip file called \'worldmap.zip\' that was exported into your export location.
Cannot save the game while in combat.
Saving allows you to switch to another character and later continue the current game. Do you want to save and exit the current game?
Disable this if you see graphical artifacts. Enabling this option will make the game only redraw changed parts of the screen every frame.
Disable this if you experience performance issues on filtered maps (dark caves for example). Enabling this option will make the game use advanced color filters, instead of solid color overlays.
Resistance against all types of conditions
Lowers the chance of being afflicted with all types of conditions by %1$d %%. This includes all types of conditions caused by monster attacks such as Poison, Dazed or Fatigue.

For every critical hit made, there is a %1$d %% chance that the hit will cause internal bleeding on the target, effectively causing the \'Internal bleeding\' condition on the target. Internal bleeding severely lowers offensive combat abilities, making the target less able to land successful attacks.

For every critical hit made, there is a %1$d %% chance that the hit will fracture some of the target\'s bones, effectively causing the \'Fracture\' condition on the target. This will severely lower the target\'s defensive combat abilities, making it less able to defend itself in subsequent attacks.

Every round (6 seconds), there is a %1$d %% chance that one of the active negative actor conditions will be lowered by one magnitude. This applies to all temporary effect types that affect the body; mental conditions such as Dazed, physical capacity conditions such as Fatigue and also blood disorders such as poison.
When an attacker makes an attack that misses, there is a %1$d %% chance that the attacker loses %2$d action points (AP). This applies to all types of melee attacks against you.

When making an attack on a target whose block chance (BC) is at least %1$d lower than your attack chance (AC), there is a %2$d %% chance that the hit will cause a concussion on the target. A concussion will severely lower the target\'s offensive combat abilities, making the target less able to land successful attacks.
Show animations for various interface elements, such as the combat bar.
The map cannot be displayed from this location.
Enables critical hits with a multiplier of x%1$.1f
Increases AP cost of using items in combat by %1$d AP
Lowers AP cost of using items in combat by %1$d AP
Increases AP cost of equipping items in combat by %1$d AP
Lowers AP cost of equipping items in combat by %1$d AP
Are you sure you want to overwrite this savegame?
Only show when overwriting a different playername
Gives a question about whether you want to overwrite when saving to a savegame slot that already contains a savegame.
Fighting style: Way of the monk
Better at fighting with one-handed swords
Better at fighting with two-handed swords
Better at fighting with blunt weapons
Make better use of shields and parrying weapons
Make better use of light armor
Make better use of heavy armor
Wield two weapons at the same time
Make better use of weapons that require both hands
Better at fighting with weapon and shield
Expert at fighting with weapon and shield
Better at fighting with pole weapons

For each skill level, increases attack chance when using daggers and shortswords by %1$d %% of the item\'s base attack chance, increases block chance by %2$d %% of the item\'s base block chance, and increases critical skill by %3$d %% of the item\'s base critical skill.

For each skill level, increases attack chance of rapiers, longswords and broadswords by %1$d %% of the item\'s base attack chance, increases block chance by %2$d %% of the item\'s base block chance, and increases critical skill by %3$d %% of the item\'s base critical skill.

For each skill level, increases attack chance of two-handed swords by %1$d %% of the item\'s base attack chance, increases block chance by %2$d %% of the item\'s base block chance, and increases critical skill by %3$d %% of the item\'s base critical skill.

For each skill level, increases attack chance of axes and greataxes by %1$d %% of the item\'s base attack chance, increases block chance by %2$d %% of the item\'s base block chance, and increases critical skill by %3$d %% of the item\'s base critical skill.

For each skill level, increases attack chance of blunt weapons by %1$d %% of the item\'s base attack chance, increases block chance by %2$d %% of the item\'s base block chance, and increases critical skill by %3$d %% of the item\'s base critical skill. This includes clubs, quarterstaves, maces, scepters, whips, war hammers and giant hammers.
When fighting without a weapon and shield, gain %1$d attack chance, %2$d damage potential and %3$d block chance per skill level.
Increase damage resistance by %1$d per skill level while having a shield or parrying weapon equipped.
While fighting without having any piece of armor equipped, gain %1$d block chance per skill level. Items made of cloth are not considered as being armor.
For every skill level, increases the block chance of every piece of light armor being worn by %1$d %% of their original block chances. Light armors include leather, light metal and hide armors.

For every skill level, increases the block chance of every piece of heavy armor being worn by %1$d %% of their original block chances. Pieces of heavy armor have their movement penalties reduced by %2$d %% per skill level, their attack speed penalties reduced by %3$d %% per skill level, and their item use cost penalties reduced by %4$d %% per skill level. Heavy armors include metal armors, chain mail and plate mail.

"Gives benefits when fighting with two weapons at the same time, one in the main hand and one in the off-hand.
Without this skill, only %1$d %% of a weapon\'s qualities may be used when equipped in the off-hand. This includes attack chance, critical skill, damage potential and block chance. Without this skill, attack cost (AP cost) of making an attack is the sum of the attack cost of the main weapon and that of the weapon used in the off-hand. The lower of both damage modifiers will be used.
With one level of this skill, %2$d %% of the off-hand\'s weapon\'s qualities may be used, and the attack cost is the highest attack cost of both weapons plus %3$d %% of the lowest attack cost of both weapons. The average of both damage modifiers will be used.
With two levels of this skill, %4$d %% of the off-hand\'s weapon\'s qualities may be used, and the attack cost equals the highest of the attack costs of the two equipped weapons. The highest damage modifier will be used."

"Gives benefits when using weapons that require both hands to wield, such as two-handed swords, greataxes or giant hammers.
Every skill level increases damage potential of two-handed weapons with %1$d %% of the original damage potential."

"Gives benefits when fighting with a weapon in the main hand and having a shield or parrying weapon equipped in the off-hand.
Every skill level increases the attack chance of weapons in the main hand with %1$d %% of their original attack chances, and the block chance of shields or parrying weapons by %2$d %% of their original block chances."

"While fighting without having any piece of armor equipped and without using a weapon or shield, gain %1$d attack chance, %2$d block chance, %3$d damage resistance and increase the maximum damage by %4$d per skill level. The skill also gives a critical multiplier of 1 plus 0.%5$d per level.
Items made of cloth are not considered as being armor."

Increases the attack chance of both wielded weapons by an additional %1$d %% of their original attack chances, in addition to the benefits given by the weapon style skill. The block chances of both wielded weapons are also increased by %2$d %% of their original block chances.

Increases damage potential of two-handed weapons by an additional %1$d %% of the original damage potential, in addition to the benefits given by the weapon style skill. The attack chances of two-handed weapons are also increased by %2$d %% of their original attack chances.

Increases both attack chances and damage potential of weapons in the main hand. The attack chance is increased by %1$d %% of the original attack chance, and the damage potential is increased by %2$d %% of the original damage potential.

For each skill level, increases attack chance when using pole weapons by %1$d %% of the item\'s base attack chance, increases block chance by %2$d %% of the item\'s base block chance, and increases critical skill by %3$d %% of the item\'s base critical skill.
Show quickslots when toolbox is opened
Makes the quickslot buttons be displayed as soon as the toolbox is opened
This is a development version of Andor\'s Trail. Savegames produced by this version are incompatible with the release version.
This is a prerelease version of Andor\'s Trail. Savegames produced by this version might not be compatible with the release version.
Use translation of interface and content, where available. (requires restart)
Changing locale requires restart. Andor\'s Trail has been closed.
Changing UI theme requires restart. Andor\'s Trail has been closed.
Access to storage is mandatory for Andor\'s Trail to handle saved games and worldmap. Closing Andor\'s Trail.
Permanently prevents monster attacks from inflicting the "Spore poisoning" status effect.
If the virtual d-pad is enabled, this setting determines how transparent it should be.
A Place to Call Your Own
Westgate Market — homes, hot meals, fresh seeds, sharp steel.
Westgate Cottage — One Room. Sewing Nook.
Westgate House — Two Rooms. Sewing & Stove.
Westgate Manor — Three Rooms. Sewing, Stove, Forge, Garden.
Westgate Estate — Four Rooms. Everything Above. Butler in Residence.
Royal Grove — Tend gently. The queen\'s saplings.
Antechamber — Wait here to be presented to the throne.
Throne Room — In the presence of Queen Sunny.
Great Hall — Stairs lead down to the lower castle.
Trophy Hall — A monument to the queen\'s adventures.
Castle Entry — South to the market. Stairs up to the roof.
Servant Quarters — Quiet between watches, please.
Storage Room — Inventory under quartermaster\'s seal.
Warden\'s Office — All visitors must be announced.
Guard Office — Sign the duty roster on entry.
Castle Roof — Mind your step. Towers at each corner.
Servants\' Hall — please mind the linens.
A cauldron simmers with a pale blue flame.
Welcome to Semos Mountain. Lock your packs.
A small canvas tent stands in a circle of stones. The drow guard eyes your fingers.
Black silk webs glisten on the cavern walls.
Twelve thrones. Twelve breaths held. Twelve quests, one geas.
A ring of stones. Sunny stood here once. The wind still remembers.
A bright clearing. Tent walls of light bend the sky here.
Silver Moon: A Service for the Elder
Crimson Moon: A Service for the Elder
Azure Moon: A Service for the Elder
Gold Moon: A Service for the Elder
Emerald Moon: A Service for the Elder
Violet Moon: A Service for the Elder
Pearl Moon: A Service for the Elder
Steve the Light-Fingered: A Last Favor
Cara of the Open Hand: A Last Favor
Sam the Sober: A Last Favor
Sightings & Tidings — every rumor of Sunny\'s party.
the Alpine Reach: Restore a watchtower
the Karst: Return a lost letter
the River Country: Steady a bridge
the Sea: Open a sealed crypt
the Ocean Shore: Measure the harvest
the Wetlands: Recover a stolen horse
the Plains: Awaken an old keeper
the Stream Country: Count the birds
the Sun Coast: Gather the pollen
the Dry Lake: Witness an oath
the Castle Region: Silence the mill
Welcome to the Bank of the Realm. Every branch shares one ledger -- deposit here, withdraw in any city. How may I assist you?
Wonderful. You\'re now a member of the bank. Carry your card and any teller in the realm will recognize you.
I would like to open an account.
I would like to deposit gold.
I would like to withdraw gold.
I want to use my lockbox.

We issue bank notes in seven denominations. Hand us gold, take a note. Hand any teller a note, take the gold back. Notes are recognised at every branch in the realm. Lockboxes work the same way -- deposit a valuable, receive a numbered voucher, redeem the voucher anywhere. We also offer short-term loans at ten percent.
How much gold would you like to deposit today?
Counted and stamped. Your note is in your bag. Thank you for your trust.
Hand me a note and I\'ll count out your gold.
Your gold is on the counter. A pleasure.
Loans are simple: borrow gold today, repay the principal plus 10% by your next visit. Only one active loan at a time.
(You owe 110 gold on a small loan.)
(You owe 550 gold on a medium loan.)
(You owe 1100 gold on a large loan.)
(You owe 5500 gold on a huge loan.)
Signed and sealed. The gold is in your purse. We\'ll see you when you\'ve earned the repayment -- and not a coin late.
Paid in full. The ledger is clear. Borrow again any time.
Bank of the Realm: Outstanding Loan
You currently owe the bank nothing.
You owe the bank 110 gold (small loan).
You owe the bank 550 gold (medium loan).
You owe the bank 1100 gold (large loan).
You owe the bank 5500 gold (huge loan).
You repaid the bank in full.
You opened an account at the Bank of the Realm. Your membership card lets any teller recognise you.
You are a long-standing customer of the bank.
Lockboxes hold any registered valuable in your name. Deposit, withdraw, or take a Mystery Cache?
Which item shall we lock away today?
Tucked away in your private drawer. Your voucher is in your bag.
Hand me your voucher and I\'ll fetch the item from the vault.
One moment... and there it is. Safe as the day you stored it.
A Mystery Cache is a sealed bundle from our overflow vault. 50 gold buys you a voucher. Redeeming the voucher draws a random valuable -- or a stack of gold -- from the bank\'s miscellaneous storage.
Buy a Mystery Cache voucher (50 gold).
Redeem a Mystery Cache voucher (random reward).
Sealed and stamped. Your voucher is in your bag.
Let\'s see what fortune put aside for you...
Move along. Eyes forward, hands visible.
Welcome to the bank. Tellers handle deposits; I handle paperwork. Need our schedule of fees?
Notes: par. Lockbox per slot: free with membership. Mystery Cache: 50g. Loans: principal + 10% on repayment. Membership: free, lifetime.
Bank of the Realm -- Westgate Branch. Members welcome.
Bank of the Realm. Step up to the counter to be served.
Bank of the Realm -- Westgate Branch.
Bank of the Realm -- Ados Branch.
Bank of the Realm -- Crossglen Branch.
Bank of the Realm -- Fallhaven Branch.
Bank of the Realm -- Vilegard Branch.
A slim crystal console hums beside Jasia\'s desk. Use it to step into the world of the Astral Beasts.
A twin to Jasia\'s console rests on Sunny\'s side table. The same nine regions wait beyond it.
The busy harbor of the main island.
A grassy slope leading inland from the harbor.
A dense forest of ancient oaks.
A sunlit clearing amid the forest.
An old stone bridge arching over a stream.
A village green with a well at its center.
The main road through the island.
A narrow lane lined with shops.
A wooden jetty jutting into the sea.
The open sea. Strange things lurk below.
The mouth of a dark cave smelling of orcs.
Grak's personal chamber, littered with trophies.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The trees grow close, forming a labyrinth.
The northern bank of the lake.
The eastern bank of the lake.
The southern bank of the lake.
The western bank of the lake.
A small island in the center of the lake.
A hidden grove at the island heart.
Rocky ground with old stone walls.
The river flows east of here.
A dark forest looms to the west.
Where the grid meets the river bend.
A sinister forest where no light reaches.
A fast-flowing river cutting through the land.
Rocky peaks soar into the clouds.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Dark tunnels of the ancient mine.
Steep rocky path up the mountain.
Narrow ledges with a long drop.
Treacherous swamp paths that all look the same.
Treacherous swamp paths that all look the same.
Treacherous swamp paths that all look the same.
Treacherous swamp paths that all look the same.
Treacherous swamp paths that all look the same.
Treacherous swamp paths that all look the same.
Treacherous swamp paths that all look the same.
Treacherous swamp paths that all look the same.
Treacherous swamp paths that all look the same.
A stone church with stained glass windows.
Dusty attic full of old boxes and cobwebs.
A damp stone basement beneath the church.
Rows of weathered tombstones in the moonlight.
A cobblestone square with a fountain.
A lively pub serving cold ale.
A narrow alley behind the road.
Stone vault doors protect the treasury.
Books and potions line every wall.
A bustling outdoor market with many stalls.
A wide road heading east from the crossroads.
A wide road heading east from the crossroads.
A wide road heading east from the crossroads.
A wide road heading east from the crossroads.
A wide road heading east from the crossroads.
A side alley west of the main road.
A comfortable inn at road end.
Well-tended garden plots with fruits and vegetables.
Rows of desks face a chalkboard.
The science room full of specimens.
Echo of bouncing balls and whistles.
Long tables and the smell of cooking.
A dock south of the jetty.
A wilder beach with black sand.
Deep claw marks score the sand.
The dragon cave entrance looms ahead.
The lightless trench far below the sea.
Rocky island colonised by seabirds and pirates.
Rocky island colonised by seabirds and pirates.
Rocky island colonised by seabirds and pirates.
Rocky island colonised by seabirds and pirates.
Rocky island colonised by seabirds and pirates.
Rocky island colonised by seabirds and pirates.
Rocky island colonised by seabirds and pirates.
Dense jungle island with serpentine paths.
Dense jungle island with serpentine paths.
Dense jungle island with serpentine paths.
Dense jungle island with serpentine paths.
Dense jungle island with serpentine paths.
Dense jungle island with serpentine paths.
Volcanic island with rivers of cooled lava.
Volcanic island with rivers of cooled lava.
Volcanic island with rivers of cooled lava.
Volcanic island with rivers of cooled lava.
Volcanic island with rivers of cooled lava.
Volcanic island with rivers of cooled lava.
Volcanic island with rivers of cooled lava.
Volcanic island with rivers of cooled lava.
Low-lying island ringed with colourful coral.
Low-lying island ringed with colourful coral.
Low-lying island ringed with colourful coral.
Low-lying island ringed with colourful coral.
Low-lying island ringed with colourful coral.
Low-lying island ringed with colourful coral.
Desolate volcanic island covered in grey ash.
Desolate volcanic island covered in grey ash.
Desolate volcanic island covered in grey ash.
Desolate volcanic island covered in grey ash.
Desolate volcanic island covered in grey ash.
Desolate volcanic island covered in grey ash.
Desolate volcanic island covered in grey ash.
Desolate volcanic island covered in grey ash.
Desolate volcanic island covered in grey ash.
Ghost-haunted island lost in sea mist.
Ghost-haunted island lost in sea mist.
Ghost-haunted island lost in sea mist.
Ghost-haunted island lost in sea mist.
Ghost-haunted island lost in sea mist.
A scruffy pirate looking for easy gold.
Leads the local band of pirates.
Carries its home on its back.
Fearsome leader of the cave orcs.
Hunts in packs through the maze.
Massive brute lurking in deep tunnels.
Ancient swamp creature of immense power.
The restless spirit of the departed.
Enormous bat that hunts in the dark.
The enormous elder dragon of the mountain.
A massive tentacled predator of the depths.
Fast predator of the jungle isle.
Its shell glows with internal heat.
A spectral being of eternal fog.
Rides the wind with deadly talons.
Shed skin of a sea snake.
Proof of battle with an orc.
Sharp fang of a forest wolf.
A gem from deep lake waters.
The magical heart of a golem.
Tasty nut from a pine cone.
Fresh apple from the city garden.
A finely made pirate captain's sword.
Old and corroded but still cuts.
Given to those who complete all guild quests.
The special reward for completing the guild.
Worn on the head to breathe underwater. Required to dive from the sea.
Marks the location of buried treasure.
Used by Grak to rally the orcs.
The pulsing heart of the Bog Horror.
The still-warm heart of an ancient dragon.
Allows connection to the Nemesis MUD server.
Pirates have been stealing from the harbor. Deal with their captain.
Old Bram wants 3 Shark Teeth as proof the waters are safe.
Drive the pirates from Crow Isle.
A treasure map was found. Retrieve the buried treasure.
Shore crabs are overrunning the docks.
The orc prisoner will help if you defeat Grak the Warchief.
Collect Hex Powder from Orc Shamans for research.
The hermit needs Wolf Pelts to survive winter.
The Lake Serpent threatens the island. Defeat it to restore peace.
Elenor believes there are Ancient Coins buried in the ruins.
Stone golems are preventing access to the ruins. Defeat 3.
Mine Trolls have taken over the deepest tunnels.
The legendary Bog Horror rises again. Defeat it.
The priest needs Swamp Moss for a potion.
Ghost Lord Morden leads the undead. Defeat him.
The ghost of Lily wants to find her mother's grave.
Collect 5 Spider Silk for the guild's ropes.
Collect 3 Rough Gems from the mine.
Defeat the Deep Octopus. You'll need the Diving Bag.
Collect 3 Ancient Coins for the school display.
The nature class needs 5 different foraged items.
Find the 3 missing books (collect special items as receipts).
Scovareth the Ancient terrorises the coast. Enter the cave and end it.
Equip the Diving Bag and descend to face the Deep Octopus.
Find and use the computer in Jasia's bedroom to connect to the Nemesis MUD.
Calm the Great Serpent by defeating it.
Collect 5 Ember Shards for the forge.
Defeat 8 Lava Crabs that threaten the forge.
Drive off the Ember Hound pack.
Defeat the Thunder Bear terrorising the island.
Protect the nesting area by defeating 6 Coral Crabs.
Clear 5 Ash Golems from the old mine.
Help the friendly ghost find peace by collecting 5 Sailor's Coins.
Welcome to the harbor, traveller. Ships leave regularly for the outer islands.
Forty years I've fished these waters. Strange creatures out there lately...
You free me? I tell you where boss is!
Lost, are you? This maze has claimed many souls.
The serpent that guards these waters must be calmed before peace returns.
I study the ancient ruins. There is something buried beneath the rubble...
These tunnels haven't been worked in decades. Strange things moved in.
Bless you, child. The dead walk in the graveyard. We need a brave soul.
I can't find my mum... Can you help me?
What'll it be? We've the best ale this side of the harbor.
All coins are safe with us. Interest rates are quite competitive.
Mail from the islands arrives every Tuesday. Anything I can help with?
Welcome to the Adventurer's Guild. We have quests for those brave enough.
This school is for all young minds of the island. Learning is power!
Class is in session. We're studying island history today.
Shh... Please keep your voice down. The books don't appreciate noise.
Room and board available. Best stew on the road!
I've seen it — enormous wings, scales like black iron. The cave is north.
Nemesis is online and accepting connections. May your adventures be legendary.
Our island has been troubled by pirates. Will you help us?
The great serpent is angry. Only a brave warrior can calm it.
The volcano's treasure is guarded by fire creatures. Strong weapons needed.
The mist hides truths. Only the pure of heart may see through it.
Storm bears are terrorising our fishing. We need them driven off.
The sea turtles are nesting and can not be disturbed. Something is threatening them.
The ash golems have taken over the old mine. We need them cleared.
Not all of us are dangerous. Some of us just want to go home.
The Bog Horror rises every decade. It is time again...
Best prices in the whole island! Step right up!
Do you wish to connect to the Nemesis MUD server?
You need to wear the Diving Bag on your head to dive below the sea.
A pocket device linked to the Nemesis MUD. Use it from anywhere to disconnect and return to a bedroom computer.
Disconnect from Nemesis and return to which location?
You need a MUD Access Token to use this device.
A heavy locked door blocks the way. What do you do?
You step out of the shadows.
You are now invisible to hostile factions.
Your concealment breaks as combat begins!
Tower of Convergence Crystal Altar Chamber
The Ruby Tower: Reclaim the Red Crystal
The Amber Tower: Reclaim the Orange Crystal
The Solar Tower: Reclaim the Yellow Crystal
The Emerald Tower: Reclaim the Green Crystal
The Sapphire Tower: Reclaim the Blue Crystal
The Mystic Tower: Reclaim the Indigo Crystal
The Amethyst Tower: Reclaim the Violet Crystal
The Ivory Tower: Reclaim the White Crystal
The Obsidian Tower: Reclaim the Black Crystal
Place all nine crystals in the altar?
The Prism of Unity is yours. The world is restored.
%1$s falls in battle, sacrificing themselves to keep you alive! You regain %2$d HP.
Your party has disbanded. All companions return to their homes.
You have left %1$s. Rank retained, benefits halved until you return.
You cannot join %1$s while a member of %2$s. Specialty guilds are mutually exclusive.
Welcome back to %1$s! Your full benefits are restored.
The scroll crumbles to dust as its last charge is spent.
The scroll flares and you are whisked to %1$s.
The scroll rejects you with a sharp ZAP! (10 damage) Only %1$s members may use this.
In honour of Aldric Ironfist and his companions, who stood fast against the Goblin Kings horde at Three Fords Bridge, and saved seventeen lives. Their names are legend.
In honour of %1$s and their companions - %2$s - who faced the awakened dark lord at the Dark Spire and prevailed. May their deeds never be forgotten.
